mapper.sql: id, brand_name, logo_url, favicon_url, primary_color, secondary_color, background_color, login_bg_url, login_slogan, copyright_text, icp_number, footer_links, mobile_icon_url, mobile_splash_url, custom_css, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_tenant_brand WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_tenant_brand ( id, brand_name, logo_url, favicon_url, primary_color, secondary_color, background_color, login_bg_url, login_slogan, copyright_text, icp_number, footer_links, mobile_icon_url, mobile_splash_url, custom_css, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{brandName}, #{logoUrl}, #{faviconUrl}, #{primaryColor}, #{secondaryColor}, #{backgroundColor}, #{loginBgUrl}, #{loginSlogan}, #{copyrightText}, #{icpNumber}, #{footerLinks}::jsonb, #{mobileIconUrl}, #{mobileSplashUrl}, #{customCss}, #{tenantId}, #{createdBy}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedTime}, #{deleted}, #{version} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_tenant_brand SET brand_name = #{brandName}, logo_url = #{logoUrl}, favicon_url = #{faviconUrl}, primary_color = #{primaryColor}, secondary_color = #{secondaryColor}, background_color = #{backgroundColor}, login_bg_url = #{loginBgUrl}, login_slogan = #{loginSlogan}, copyright_text = #{copyrightText}, icp_number = #{icpNumber}, footer_links = #{footerLinks}::jsonb, mobile_icon_url = #{mobileIconUrl}, mobile_splash_url = #{mobileSplashUrl}, custom_css = #{customCss}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = #{version} + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
